title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available for Earbuds and Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab displays current/available versions, release notes, individual Update buttons for earbuds and charge case, and an Update All button when firmware updates are available for both components
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure your Poly Bluetooth earbuds and charge case are connected and paired.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Locate and tap on the Software Update tab/section.
Verify that firmware updates are available for both the earbuds and the charge case.
Observe the Software Update tab content.
expected: The Software Update tab displays: current and available firmware versions for both earbuds and charge case, release notes for each component, individual "Update" buttons for earbuds and charge case, and an additional "Update All" button.
